title: Faithful Companions: Ravens
description: The simplicity of bundle delivering ravens
body:
# Faithful Companions

## 🐦 Ravens
New wildlife that soar through your world, bringing life and atmosphere to the skies above. While adding a way to transport items to other players via bundles

### Raven Types (Most only avalible to 26.1.2 or newer)

Dark - Spawns Naturally (50%)

Mossy Green - Spawns Naturally (35%)

Albino - Spawns Naturally (10%)

Albino Crosseyed - Spawns Naturally (5%)

Three Eyed - Nametag [three-eyed]

Moonlit - Item [Nether Star] - doesn't consume

Deep Dark - Item [Echo Shard] - doesn't consume

### How Updates will work
The first version 1.21.3 will have all the basic features that will be needed for the ravens. Then there will be updates all the way upto the latest version. Then all future versions will be updated to. There will not be any backported updates

**1.21.9 Will be Skipped**

### Builtin Mods
- Geckolib

## Credits Attribution

Arathain - Code and assets used from Masons Decor
